name: gap-criteria-rich
description: Service repo configured with the G1-G4 Factory-parity advisory tooling; the new advisory criteria pass. Offline by design (no GitHub); exercises applicability + pass shapes end-to-end through the real engine.

files..pre-commit-config.yaml:
repos:
  - repo: local
    hooks:
      - id: check-added-large-files
files.TECH_DEBT.md:
# Technical Debt

Tracked register of known shortcuts and their planned paydown.
files.RUNBOOK.md:
# Runbook

## Restart the service

1. Drain traffic from the load balancer.
2. Roll the deployment and watch the health endpoint.
3. Re-enable traffic once readiness passes. Escalate to on-call if errors persist past five minutes.
files.ARCHITECTURE.md:
# Architecture

Routes live in src/routes, business logic in src/services, persistence in src/db. Requests flow through validation middleware, into thin handlers, then services. Cross-cutting concerns (logging, tracing, error reporting) are wired at the app boundary so handlers stay focused on domain logic.
files.AGENTS.md:
# Agent briefing

## Build & test

- npm test runs the suite.
files.docker-compose.yml:
services:
  db:
    image: postgres:16
  cache:
    image: redis:7
files.migrations/001_init.sql: CREATE TABLE invoices (id serial primary key, amount integer);
files.mkdocs.yml:
site_name: Gap Rich
nav:
  - Home: index.md
files..github/workflows/ci.yml:
name: ci
on: [push]
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: mkdocs build
      - run: echo 'validate AGENTS.md commands'
      - uses: getsentry/action-release@v1
      - uses: zaproxy/action-baseline@v0
      - name: deploy
        env:
          TOKEN: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_TOKEN }}
